task: v139 preference candidate confirmation and undo

current_state.head: afc62e5 feat: 增加授权规则确认固化 0.133.0
current_state.previous_stage: authorization_rule confirmation writes config/authorization.local.json and supports undo

similar_implementations.evidence: src/jarvis_lite/contacts.py centralizes config/contacts.local.json parsing, save, remove and count.
src/jarvis_lite/app_registry.py persists app aliases in config/apps.local.json and preserves unrelated app overrides on undo.
src/jarvis_lite/authorization_rules.py persists rule text in config/authorization.local.json and only displays it without changing execution decisions.

design_direction.scope: Add explicit confirmation and undo for preference candidates as an auditable local config record.
design_direction.storage: config/preferences.local.json with a preferences list; records contain preference text, source, created_at and updated_at.
design_direction.observable_effect: /config-manager-status shows local preference count; candidate history and active list show confirm and undo state.
non_goals: Do not use saved preferences to alter response style automatically in this stage.
Do not add /config-candidate-confirm or /config-candidate-undo to the LLM command whitelist.
Do not let ordinary chat or LLM fallback write preferences.
Do not write API keys or sensitive settings into preferences.local.json.
